sentences.target: Je me sens joyeux ce matin.

translations.fr: Je me sens joyeux ce matin.
translations.de: Ich fühle mich heute Morgen glücklich.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上觉得很开心。
translations.ru: Я сегодня утром чувствую себя счастливым.
translations.pt: Eu me sinto feliz hoje de manhã.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं खुश महसूस कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg føler meg glad i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Jag känner mig lycklig i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Mă simt fericit în această dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg føler mig glad her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝はうれしい気分です。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb 'sens'.
Clitic object/reflexive pronoun, 1st person singular; part of the pronominal construction with 'se sentir', marking reflexivity.
Lexical verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; used pronominally ('se sentir') and takes a predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complements the verb (state of the subject).
Deictic determiner modifying 'matin'; forms a temporal noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine; head of the NP 'ce matin' functioning as a temporal adverbial.

sentences.target: Ils sont joyeux aujourd'hui au parc.

translations.fr: Ils sont joyeux aujourd'hui au parc.
translations.en: They are happy today at the park.
translations.es: Hoy están felices en el parque.
translations.de: Sie sind heute im Park fröhlich.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们今天在公园里很开心。
translations.yue: 佢哋今日喺公園好開心。
translations.pt: Hoje eles estão felizes no parque.
translations.vi: Hôm nay họ rất vui ở công viên.
translations.nl: Ze zijn vandaag blij in het park.
translations.hi: आज वे पार्क में खुश हैं.
translations.nb: I dag er de glade i parken.
translations.id: Hari ini mereka bahagia di taman.
translations.sv: I dag är de glada i parken.
translations.da: I dag er de glade i parken.
translations.ja: 彼らは今日公園でうれしいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; syntactic subject of 'sont'.
Auxiliary verb (copula) in present indicative, 3rd person plural; links subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine plural (invariable in masculine); complements the copula 'sont'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Preposition (contraction of 'à le'); introduces the locative complement 'parc'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au', indicating location.

sentences.target: Mon frère a l'air joyeux devant la boulangerie.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ fʁɛʁ a l‿ɛʁ ʒwa.jø də.vɑ̃ la bu.lɑ̃ʒ.ʁi/

translations.fr: Mon frère a l'air joyeux devant la boulangerie.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ fʁɛʁ a l‿ɛʁ ʒwa.jø də.vɑ̃ la bu.lɑ̃ʒ.ʁi/
translations.en: My brother looks happy in front of the bakery.
translations.es: Mi hermano parece feliz frente a la panadería.
translations.de: Mein Bruder sieht vor der Bäckerei glücklich aus.
translations.it: Mio fratello sembra felice davanti alla panetteria.
translations.ko: 내 남동생은 빵집 앞에서 행복해 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥在面包店门口看起来很开心。
translations.yue: 我哥哥喺麵包店門口睇落好開心。
translations.ru: Мой брат выглядит счастливым у пекарни.
translations.pt: Meu irmão parece feliz em frente à padaria.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi trông vui vẻ trước tiệm bánh.
translations.nl: Mijn broer ziet er blij uit voor de bakkerij.
translations.uk: Мій брат виглядає щасливим перед пекарнею.
translations.hu: A fivérem boldognak tűnik a pékség előtt.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई बेकरी के सामने खुश दिखता है.
translations.pl: Mój brat wygląda na szczęśliwego przed piekarnią.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου φαίνεται χαρούμενος μπροστά από το αρτοποιείο.
translations.nb: Broren min ser glad ut foran bakeriet.
translations.id: Saudaraku terlihat bahagia di depan toko roti.
translations.sv: Min bror ser glad ut framför bageriet.
translations.ro: Fratele meu pare fericit în fața brutăriei.
translations.cs: Můj bratr vypadá šťastně před pekárnou.
translations.da: Min bror ser glad ud foran bageriet.
translations.ja: 私の兄はパン屋の前でうれしそうです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; modifies 'frère'.
Common noun, masculine; syntactic subject of 'a'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the idiomatic construction 'avoir l’air' (to look/seem).
Elided definite article before vowel; determiner of 'air' in the idiom.
Common noun; complement within 'avoir l’air', forming a copular-like predicate with the following adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; describes the subject via the construction 'avoir l’air'.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article determiner; modifies 'boulangerie'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'devant', indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu sembles joyeux avec tes amis.

translations.fr: Tu sembles joyeux avec tes amis.
translations.en: You seem happy with your friends.
translations.de: Du wirkst glücklich mit deinen Freunden.
translations.it: Sembri felice con i tuoi amici.
translations.zh-Hans: 你和朋友在一起看起来很开心。
translations.yue: 你同朋友一齊睇落好開心。
translations.ru: Ты выглядишь счастливым со своими друзьями.
translations.pt: Você parece feliz com seus amigos.
translations.he: אתה נראה שמח עם החברים שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn trông vui khi ở cùng bạn bè.
translations.nl: Je lijkt gelukkig met je vrienden.
translations.uk: Ти виглядаєш щасливим зі своїми друзями.
translations.hi: तुम अपने दोस्तों के साथ खुश दिखते हो.
translations.pl: Wyglądasz na szczęśliwego ze swoimi przyjaciółmi.
translations.el: Φαίνεσαι χαρούμενος με τους φίλους σου.
translations.nb: Du virker glad sammen med vennene dine.
translations.sv: Du verkar glad med dina vänner.
translations.da: Du ser glad ud sammen med dine venner.
translations.ja: 君は友だちと一緒だとうれしそうです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject of 'sembles'.
Lexical linking verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complement of 'sembles', describing the subject.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular (agreeing with a plural noun); modifies 'amis'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.
